pi_items.source: Task setup and export scripts both use world_survey.gpkg.
Queried sqlite_master of world_survey.gpkg; the table world_capitals exists.
Queried world_capitals table; confirmed Tokyo, Canberra, and Brasilia are present. Verified that JP, AU, and BR are their correct ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes.
Matches ANDROID_GPKG definition in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh, as well as the startup path in setup_qfield.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real-world dataset world_survey.gpkg, which contains actual world capitals. The target cities Tokyo, Canberra, and Brasilia all exist within the world_capitals table. The expected ISO-3166-1 alpha-2 codes (JP, AU, BR) are correct. The android_path defined in metadata correctly matches the path used by the environment scripts.
